item.title: 独立推理 / Token 运营商
item.summary: 通过推理调度、模型覆盖和 Token 运营提供独立模型服务的范式。

updates.event: 政策加大算力券支持力度，鼓励各区联合创新主体探索发放 Token 券、智能体服务券。

evidence.source_quote: 加大算力券等支持力度，鼓励有条件的区联合创新主体探索发放 Token 券、智能体服务券

evidence_cards.source_quote: 商汤大装置将主流国产芯片MFU（模型算力利用率）提升85%～152%

updates.event: AMD Helios and the Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine will operate as a single disaggregated inference workflow, providing the high-throughput prompt engine and rack-scale efficiency for processing prompts and large context windows.
updates.after: "ultra-high throughput prompt engine with rack-scale efficiency"

evidence.source_quote: AMD Helios™ and the Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine will operate as a single disaggregated inference workflow, combining ultra-high-throughput from AMD Instinct™ GPUs, with ultra-fast token generation of Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine.

evidence_cards.source_quote: AMD Helios™ and the Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine will operate as a single disaggregated inference workflow, combining ultra-high-throughput from AMD Instinct™ GPUs, with ultra-fast token generation of Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine.

updates.event: 同等质量下Fireworks比闭源模型便宜5到10倍（CNBC）

evidence.source_quote: 据CNBC，同等质量下Fireworks比闭源模型便宜5到10倍

evidence_cards.source_quote: 据CNBC，同等质量下Fireworks比闭源模型便宜5到10倍

updates.event: 该行业分析称Together AI、Fireworks AI等公司的毛利率约为47%。

evidence.source_quote: 行业测算显示，传统“裸金属”算力租赁毛利率大致在20%至30%区间，而专注Token运营的厂商，毛利率普遍能做到40%至50%，海外的Together AI、Fireworks AI等公司也大致维持在47%左右，明显高于单纯出租算力的同行。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 行业测算显示，传统“裸金属”算力租赁毛利率大致在20%至30%区间，而专注Token运营的厂商，毛利率普遍能做到40%至50%，海外的Together AI、Fireworks AI等公司也大致维持在47%左右，明显高于单纯出租算力的同行。

updates.event: 该行业分析估计，专注Token运营的厂商毛利率约为40%至50%。

facts.subject: slm_training_pipeline
facts.statement: PyroDash trains the SLM in three stages: control-token embedding learning, offloading-oriented supervised fine-tuning, and cost-aware alignment with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO).

evidence_cards.source_quote: PyroDash trains the SLM in three stages: control-token embedding learning, offloading-oriented supervised fine-tuning, and cost-aware alignment with Group Relative Policy Optimization.

facts.subject: handoff_mechanism
facts.statement: PyroDash implements token-level SLM-LLM collaborative inference where the SLM emits a control token to request assistance and a Collaborate Engine sends the query and partial reasoning trace to a frozen LLM in a single handoff.

evidence_cards.source_quote: During generation, the SLM decides whether to request assistance by emitting a control token. A Collaborate Engine then sends the query and partial reasoning trace to a frozen LLM for completion through a single handoff.

facts.subject: router_requirement
facts.statement: PyroDash internalizes the routing policy in the SLM and requires no separate router, no LLM retraining, and no access to LLM logits.

evidence_cards.source_quote: The policy is internalized in the SLM, requiring neither a separate router, LLM retraining, nor access to LLM logits.

facts.subject: data_regulation_sandbox
facts.statement: 创新构建数据监管沙盒机制

evidence_cards.source_quote: 创新构建数据监管沙盒机制

facts.subject: inference_cost_lambda_0_6
facts.statement: At lambda=0.6, PyroDash reduces total inference cost from USD 49.36 to USD 1.78.

evidence_cards.source_quote: reducing total cost from USD 49.36 to USD 1.78.

facts.subject: token_operator_gross_margin_estimate
facts.statement: 该行业分析估计，专注Token运营的厂商毛利率约为40%至50%。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 行业测算显示，传统“裸金属”算力租赁毛利率大致在20%至30%区间，而专注Token运营的厂商，毛利率普遍能做到40%至50%，海外的Together AI、Fireworks AI等公司也大致维持在47%左右，明显高于单纯出租算力的同行。

facts.statement: 该行业分析称Together AI、Fireworks AI等公司的毛利率约为47%。

facts.subject: annual_voucher_funding
facts.statement: 每年投放上亿元算力券、模型券和数据券

evidence_cards.source_quote: 每年投放上亿元算力券、模型券和数据券

facts.subject: inference_token_price_change
facts.statement: 单token价格相比去年已降到约八分之一到十分之一

evidence_cards.source_quote: 单 token 价格相比去年已降到约八分之一到十分之一

facts.subject: cost_reduction_via_context_handover
facts.statement: 通过上下文交接技术把成本砍掉约四成

evidence_cards.source_quote: 这套上下文交接术把成本砍掉了四成

facts.subject: token_daily_capacity
facts.statement: Beijing E-Town has built the city's first token factory with a daily token production capacity of 1.4 trillion.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 北京经开区建成全市首家词元工厂，词元日产能达 1.4 万亿

facts.subject: llm_token_ratio_lambda_0_6
facts.statement: At lambda=0.6, PyroDash achieves 54.55% accuracy with an LLM token ratio of 1.90% and 0.012 LLM calls per example.

evidence_cards.source_quote: With $\lambda=0.6$, it achieves 54.55 percent accuracy with a 1.90 percent LLM token ratio and 0.012 LLM calls per example

facts.subject: accuracy_gain_lambda_0_05
facts.statement: At lambda=0.05, PyroDash improves average accuracy by 6.36 percentage points over the LLM-only baseline.

evidence_cards.source_quote: it achieves 64.04 percent average accuracy, 6.36 percentage points above the LLM-only baseline

facts.subject: accuracy_lambda_0_05
facts.statement: With lambda=0.05, PyroDash achieves 64.04% average accuracy across five math reasoning benchmarks, 6.36 percentage points above the LLM-only baseline, while reducing cost by 20.4%.

evidence_cards.source_quote: With $\lambda=0.05$, it achieves 64.04 percent average accuracy, 6.36 percentage points above the LLM-only baseline, while reducing cost by 20.4 percent.

facts.subject: token_daily_capacity
facts.statement: 北京经开区建成全市首家词元工厂，词元日产能达 1.4 万亿

evidence_cards.source_quote: 北京经开区建成全市首家词元工厂，词元日产能达 1.4 万亿

facts.subject: model_output_speed
facts.statement: 当前主流大模型输出速度在30到40 token每秒，快的能到300，已有芯片可将8B模型推到15000 token每秒

evidence_cards.source_quote: 当前主流大模型输出速度在30到40 token每秒，快的能到300，但已有芯片可以将8B模型推到15000 token每秒

facts.subject: token_factory_capacity_growth
facts.statement: 润建股份Token工厂产能目前基本保持每月成倍增长。

evidence_cards.source_quote: 我们基本保持每月成倍增长

facts.subject: context_handover_method
facts.statement: Stencil的Can Boluk提出通过上下文交接术降低AI编程Agent成本

evidence_cards.source_quote: Stencil 的 Can Boluk 拆解了 SWE-Bench 基准测试数据

facts.subject: open_source_agent_infrastructure
facts.statement: Beijing released the first domestically open-source agent common infrastructure, providing a secure and controllable agent operating foundation for OPCs.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 北京发布国内首个开源的智能体共性基础设施，为 OPC 提供安全可控的智能体运行底座

facts.subject: agent_harness_token_dominance
facts.statement: 以Harness为基础的Agent技术让Coding场景的token消耗急速膨胀，迅速占据绝对优势

evidence_cards.source_quote: 以 Harness 为基础的 Agent 技术意外改变了格局，Coding 场景的 token 消耗急速膨胀，迅速占据绝对优势

facts.subject: model_voucher_instant_support_platform
facts.statement: Beijing launched the nation's first instant-support platform for model vouchers.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 上线全国首个模型券即时支持平台

facts.subject: token_daily_production_capacity
facts.statement: 北京经开区建成全市首家词元工厂，词元日产能达1.4万亿

evidence_cards.source_quote: 北京经开区建成全市首家词元工厂，词元日产能达 1.4 万亿

facts.subject: token_economy_policy_direction
facts.statement: Beijing's policy encourages developing the Token economy by promoting general processors for agent system calls, dedicated low-latency high-throughput inference chips, and inference architecture optimizations including heterogeneous collaboration, storage-compute collaboration, and intelligent scheduling to reduce inference cost and improve token efficiency.

evidence_cards.source_quote: 鼓励发展 Token 经济。推动创新主体研发适配智能体系统调用、复杂任务调度与高频决策的通用处理器，开发低延迟、高吞吐专用推理芯片。推动创新主体开展推理架构等关键技术攻关，通过异构协同、存算协同以及智能调度等降低推理成本，加快推理缓存复用、智能任务路由等应用层效率优化，全链路优化提高 Token 效率
